closure_effect.strongest_valid_implication: OPH structural branch plus a physical QFRC certificate, a target-free source root, an operational scale, and a frozen RG/mass-definition packet would determine a unique convention-labelled sextet. Those physical certificates are not supplied.

requires: exported triangular array or controlled dependent increments

rg_transport.requires: frozen locally-Lipschitz beta/matching packet and non-blowup domain

source_root.requires: target-free map plus strict interval-Newton or Krawczyk inclusion

finite_maxent_non_gaussianity.effect_on_rscc: The former finite-MaxEnt-to-Gaussian justification is false. An exact primitive-path closure or a proved refinement CLT is required instead.
finite_maxent_non_gaussianity.statement: On a finite spectrum, MaxEnt subject to first and second moments has an exponential-quadratic Gibbs law; it is not thereby a Gaussian density.

scale_and_scheme_no_go.absolute_scale: Dimensionless source data are invariant under a common positive rescaling and cannot select GeV values without an operational dimensionful receipt.
scale_and_scheme_no_go.renormalization_scheme: Running quark masses are scheme coordinates; a convention-labelled sextet requires frozen beta functions, thresholds, matching, and endpoint definitions.

selector_boundary.equivariant_obstruction: An equivariant section requires a stabilizer-fixed point in each orbit fiber.
selector_boundary.positive_gap_selector: A complete finite invariant candidate class with a unique positive-gap minimizer remains unique under sup-norm cost errors smaller than half the gap.

historical_status: The RSCC/QFRC packet follows target-exposed formula discovery and is not prospective evidence.

neutral_register_nonuniqueness.scope: Changing an otherwise unobserved finite register dimension preserves the broad structural signature while changing normalized coefficients. This does not by itself construct a realization of every stronger OPH carrier condition.

qfrc_conditional_rigidity.what_is_forced: Normalized trace fixes rank/dimension weights once the typed registers, exact projectors, multiplicities, signs, winding, and exhaustive primitive paths are supplied.
qfrc_conditional_rigidity.what_is_not_forced: The present OPH axioms do not select that register ledger, path catalogue, ranks, signs, winding character, exhaustion statement, or positive-gap winner.

family_label_stability.statement: A continuous Hermitian family with a uniform positive eigenvalue gap has continuous ordered spectral projectors and no label crossing.

hash_freeze.statement: A collision-resistant pre-release commitment detects later mutation, but a hash made after target-exposed discovery cannot make the packet prospective.

one_higgs_singular_values.statement: For one Higgs doublet and canonically normalized quark fields, the mass eigenvalues at a common scale are v/sqrt(2) times the singular values of the corresponding Yukawa matrix.

own_scale_and_pole_roots.statement: A simple own-scale or complex-pole root is locally unique by the implicit-function theorem after the running self-energy packet is fixed.
